tweets.content: Sk Hynix is now trading under $SKHYV! It's now up an insane 16%. I wonder how Sk Hynix over in Korea is going to react on Monday.
tweets.translated: Sk Hynix 现在以 $SKHYV 进行交易！现在已经疯狂上涨了 16%。我想知道韩国的SK海力​​士周一会有何反应。

tweets.content: Why do I have this weird feeling the main reason retail is excited SK Hynix NASDAQ listing. Is because they can do degen option calls instead of individual stock purchases.
tweets.translated: 为什么我有这种奇怪的感觉，主要原因是散户兴奋SK海力士纳斯达克上市。是因为他们可以进行 degen 期权看涨而不是购买个股。

tweets.content: Mitsubishi Motors joins robotics race to deploy humanoid workers by 2027. Pairing with Highlanders, a Japanese robotics company. - Agility $CCXI x Foxconn, Toyota - Apptronik x $JBL, Mercedes - Highlanders x Mitsubishi - Figure × BMW - Boston Dynamics x Hyundai (subsidiaries) - Optimus x Tesla (Internal) - Rainbow Robotics x Samsung (subsidiaries) Idk if it's just me of there's a lot of patterns with humanoid companies playing buddy-buddy up with a major auto player/manufacturer. If they're not already vertically integrated by one already. Then the Chinese players like UBTech/AgiBot/Unitree don't seem to care and work with a wide variety of auto players in China. Curious how this trend plays out...
tweets.translated: 三菱汽车加入机器人竞赛，到 2027 年部署人形工人。与日本机器人公司 Highlanders 合作。 - Agility $CCXI x Foxconn、Toyota - Apptronik x $JBL、Mercedes - Highlanders x Mitsubishi - Figure × BMW - Boston Dynamics x Hyundai（子公司） - Optimus x Tesla（内部） - Rainbow Robotics x Samsung（子公司） 我不知道是否有很多人形公司与主要汽车制造商/制造商玩伙伴关系的模式。如果它们还没有被垂直整合。那么像 UBTech/AgiBot/Unitree 这样的中国厂商似乎并不关心中国的各种汽车厂商，也不与他们合作。好奇这种趋势如何发挥作用......
